behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is between summary-write logic and persisted per-dimension findings for the same round (module/state handoff). Unit is too low because a single function test can miss repository/query mismatch. Rejected System: behavior text is about stored findings/round matching, not OS/network/subprocess. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no dependence on model output quality or multi-agent sequence is stated.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary service + findings repository (test DB). Seed round with at least one FAIL finding, attempt to store PASS summary, assert write is rejected with a conflict error and no PASS summary row is committed.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Test requires cross-module persistence and round-scoped query behavior, matching Integration.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: Real failure is stale/manual summary text diverging from stored findings, which appears when gate logic integrates summary source + findings store. Unit is too low because it may not exercise data-source precedence wiring. Rejected System: no real OS/network/subprocess requirement in behavior text. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: verdict source selection is deterministic data-access logic, not model judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Set stored findings to include FAIL, but set summary text to all PASS. Run gate verdict computation through real service/repo wiring; assert verdict is non-PASS and derived from stored findings, not summary string.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Directly tests module interaction that caused the regression.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: Behavior spans request validation + persistence/audit logging. Unit could miss that warning record is actually emitted/stored with the override transaction. Rejected System: behavior does not require real subprocess/OS/network. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no model-output dependence or multi-agent sequence in the behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Invoke summary submission without override flag and assert override is rejected. Invoke again with explicit override flag and assert summary is accepted and an audit warning record is persisted with actor, round, timestamp, and reason.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Needs end-to-end local module wiring for validation and audit persistence.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the gate requires a review round identifier produced after the latest fix commit before PASS can be finalized.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is correlation between fix commit metadata and review-round metadata across modules/state stores. Unit is too low because the bug is stale-state acceptance after fixes. Rejected System: behavior text requires commit/round ordering checks, not real git subprocess semantics. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: rule is timestamp/identifier freshness, not model decision quality or multi-agent chain.
behaviors.test_description: Seed latest fix commit C2 and an older review round tied to C1. Attempt PASS finalization with old round id and assert block. Seed new round id generated after C2 and assert PASS is eligible.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Integration test with persisted commit/round metadata is sufficient.

behaviors.description: In the live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real review-agent round in the live loop; mocking the agent run can falsely satisfy "fresh round" without proving the loop truly executed an AI review step on updated diff. Rejected Workflow: text requires one fresh review-agent round gate before PASS, not multiple chained agentic decisions. Rejected System-only: the critical dependency is real agent run semantics, not just OS/process behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Run a live loop on updated diff with real review-agent invocation. Verify PASS finalization is blocked before the new round executes, then allowed only after the fresh post-fix round is recorded for that diff.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Uses real agent invocation boundary, which matches Agentic minimum.

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, the outcome is escalation rather than PASS.
behaviors.justification: Decision uses stored findings + rounds-remaining state; failure appears at service/state boundary. Unit is too low because exhaustion and unresolved MUST-FIX often come from separate modules. Rejected Agentic: behavior text says "stored results" and does not require re-evaluating model output quality. Rejected Workflow: no live multi-step execution requirement is stated here.
behaviors.test_description: Seed stored results with unresolved MUST-FIX and rounds_remaining=0. Run gate decision and assert escalation outcome, PASS blocked, and escalation reason references unresolved MUST-FIX.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Deterministic state-machine behavior over persisted data fits Integration.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly targets a live multi-round review workflow, requiring sequential agentic rounds plus final gate decision and escalation emission. Lower levels can miss cross-round state carryover/regression. Rejected Agentic-only: text says "multi-round review workflow" (multiple sequential steps), so single-step agentic coverage is insufficient.
behaviors.test_description: Execute end-to-end live workflow across multiple review rounds on real updated diffs until round budget is exhausted while MUST-FIX remains unresolved. Assert PASS is blocked at terminal step and escalation event/record is emitted with unresolved findings context.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Test description requires multi-step live pipeline execution, matching Workflow.
